name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zadk4pgv1ml29bunscmuvd39pdfn29tid75glvb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze8ipo7f6j5mb5465ea5pn0q5o7pptlqo5qi6p5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z88iohtcd24smepppc4phk4bmdqtg02q7h7i2cj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqtpl3o7u33389pqherhu1rj983gkqi4p353909o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z544495okfnce39plunf5f7hlnq7l2efs1npfkp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1isuk35qlk3kouo7g706ar1plc324njfsdn4ppg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7v2bvend0fvliiqlsm7lq0uqkt5phclr8cl54m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zph5pfsj7ugtfmgm5v6234r3kudqlf8njnv90328_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z541fg1se72fsd7he3r5jip7ldk74o6r022u028g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zif5om7oi270opuafev3an1gaf85do444cl1kr60_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjcp14n0v3bnrkkttgcakhhe36rfeo9o2k65dec8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5k9jjsdsm1abctitchtm8banbm96j1qf4129tq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhbbba7pd1ms4i8499ldhsiorgu0g50p1o437log_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5h5raefolrpurgk1fc78l4qptg025ksejsqh38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znv4jqivibj6dmn69avti4s1rf3t5qomqcu6mih0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh0vbqgkmtqd158t1iclt42mrjja9s1825oeg310_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0dg7ihqibfb0eu9vse7oen6rvta7c645k5hnlko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4rft3siueqn7718be43077gll1b2lk5j0s9orh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd9n8tgr8qhmd0fe8gdne819c621m5euhbetisqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgcnusvbb28rtj13ca10f8cgc5bmnfrf3viu44k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj1quo4r8elpb8vh2ur1enbjetjrpbgfd5e74djg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zgl3oqcsqun1fcvltah25ckbsoqt1n1d7flvrcdo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuoujhvdusm5vsdesgb31njok4h4mgmfvfdmh518_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjmeob4cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

The Fake News is lying.

**The law is on our side.**

I’ve filed one of the **STRONGEST** and **LARGEST** election lawsuits in history to get answers for the rigged and corrupt electoral disaster that has shocked this great nation.

**If the process was illegitimate, Then so are the results.**

Every day, more whistleblowers are coming forth, giving us their support. We must hold the line until our lawsuit shows the TRUTH to the American people.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Help us save parental rights
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5khlm8t6229gn5o587bdvp282bqom8u8tfvqf50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjm9oj6cdh2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zntpa68sdj15jvpvje2dor1b2v3punkifvmegnho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjm9oj6cdh2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9ug1sg68bufgqjhm73cq6fjt1jss16v6nf49ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjm9oj6cdh2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49n5op3pnr5jmjfaqq1on11gee2kpdctdgg7s10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpjm9oj6cdh2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---

---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

body:

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70ae96269df14e5d96e23d840964886e&_e=tbMaJMrpx4XmUh1QeTybB0Suv00jt5UySot82MsTy5CUMFGR4Td0K0kDXekNYdc7fBLrMxRHhvtvOgrnucBlm8hucglqLEDLJ_OyJ-mGMdksWa3AEmonDnt-ZhMOt9mLcu1-R79PR8YV0yEewCnscCMxsbUqTJ-9pd2vX5NQ_Xgo5vjIlmmGrNSD5UjXKpyZbw6dBrmwOeCdzqB9RT1Stq2nm970xih76NBX5GOS52Wi8p_C4y2d4wxsDRj_4CxzXxiQwdsNdqL9JVaasa_jIVrHW_ZM-IiGFJFZD4EVw2FKmMVznNvwZecC22Tcj95A)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70ae96269df14e5d96e23d840964886e&_e=tbMaJMrpx4XmUh1QeTybB0Suv00jt5UySot82MsTy5CUMFGR4Td0K0kDXekNYdc7fBLrMxRHhvtvOgrnucBlm8hucglqLEDLJ_OyJ-mGMdksWa3AEmonDnt-ZhMOt9mLcu1-R79PR8YV0yEewCnscCMxsbUqTJ-9pd2vX5NQ_XiuxG2Yq1p26H5iFTJvDUenGuYWkcjJpgduVBJZYUwX9ZP1i7uNiJY4gxmeimXtlujUdctSKAlOu4of_zj0Ls1Zi8YoMVLwtAOBskmNBt0XCUSHAHtnIPi2B90g1xJANzZYbPjyj4s7JrXL85ZhfD3V)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70ae96269df14e5d96e23d840964886e&_e=tbMaJMrpx4XmUh1QeTybB0Suv00jt5UySot82MsTy5CUMFGR4Td0K0kDXekNYdc7fBLrMxRHhvtvOgrnucBlm8hucglqLEDLJ_OyJ-mGMdksWa3AEmonDnt-ZhMOt9mLcu1-R79PR8YV0yEewCnscCMxsbUqTJ-9pd2vX5NQ_XjeYypggX0l56ugqWh4v8aPZzwJaYum8gke0bJpYbTzffpQxi5hA4HD1bdqyLmdZjXyxna1k7CrGzOYqqzDXaCC0yQ8QW5lilJDl6tQ9CY6uU8UMZqcigloh92wIPg8SAAlZrJb_xKzamBuiTagy1G7)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70ae96269df14e5d96e23d840964886e&_e=tbMaJMrpx4XmUh1QeTybB0Suv00jt5UySot82MsTy5CUMFGR4Td0K0kDXekNYdc7fBLrMxRHhvtvOgrnucBlm8hucglqLEDLJ_OyJ-mGMdksWa3AEmonDnt-ZhMOt9mLcu1-R79PR8YV0yEewCnscCMxsbUqTJ-9pd2vX5NQ_Xg0XPkcATPkexqX53XTwMIdOWKC51HIFN0E4FdhHdPTgO28ntWyjSGG5mjANPXxabbC-CJqmCiQK_idHucxDrRmnrkHmNTzABxDGLPK7MM7S37BhLaT3LD0IsJy_5DrRpLhQxKDF2dYabyFCBAWZsOp)

As it hit the central U.S. and the Midwest with blizzard conditions and freezing rain it spawned tornadoes elsewhere as it slowly moved across states. Due to the storm, over 15 million people were under winter weather advisories and warnings, while around 2,700 flights were canceled Tuesday alone across the U.S. as blizzard conditions, severe thunderstorms, and high winds disrupted travel.Multiple feet of snow was dumped on the Sierra Nevada, and heavy rains descended on Southern California throughout the week. The National Weather READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo9djso31jmjpoftfqc3mgq310ej9ssilhjrpu7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpge4o74clh2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpd06degqrms4bcr4hrfq98pi2p91vns67a2rj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpge4o74clh2bs) | #### [ New Tax Regulations May Affect Millions Of Americans Next Year As 2023 approaches, little-noticed tax regulation changes have come about that may affect you. As part of March’s American Rescue Plan, those who use apps like Venmo or PayPal regularly might have a new form to fill out. Anyone who was paid more than $600 for selling goods or services using a third-party money app should get a 1099-K form to detail that money. Though the whole thing might get confusing pretty quickly.Many experts worry the IRS doesn’t have the resources to deal with the amount of these forms they could receive. Some even worry the IRS could get forms READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z85aa9qf3p51704mflpl011l5uem94o4t52kaf1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpge4o74clh2bs)

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: House Republicans named me the next Majority Leader. Now that it's official, I'm humbly asking you for advice >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087660:6VMDlGGEN:m:1:3331421248:E465607FAC0CEA8AF73231EA1ED8769B:r)
Peter,
I'm proud to have served as your Republican Whip and now, I'm honored to serve as your next Majority Leader!
I've traveled to all parts of the country \-- from rural plains to bustling cities to the quiet suburbs -- where people share their personal stories with me about how the agenda of the Radical Left have made their lives worse.
[**I can promise you this: now that we're in power, the Radical Left's agenda will stop with me and our strong Republican Majority. But I need YOUR HELP to make sure we're prepared for the battle of our lifetime.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087661:6VMDlGGEN:m:1:3331421248:E465607FAC0CEA8AF73231EA1ED8769B:r)
I just launched my [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087661:6VMDlGGEN:m:1:3331421248:E465607FAC0CEA8AF73231EA1ED8769B:r) to gather feedback from Patriots who I haven't had the honor of speaking with yet. It's just a couple questions and your feedback will go a long way to help me and other Congressional leaders understand how we can best help you.
_The better I know you, the more I can help YOU._
You see, the Democrats are fuming they lost the Majority and are furious to see their radical policies be stonewalled in Congress. That's why they're going all-out to stop us.
[**In other words -- the fight is far from over and I still need your help. Can you take a minute to share your thoughts with GOP leaders by replying to my Majority Leader Survey before midnight?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087661:6VMDlGGEN:m:1:3331421248:E465607FAC0CEA8AF73231EA1ED8769B:r)
For America,
Steve Scalise
Majority Leader-elect

**FLASHBACK**

**The Night Before The Botched Election**

We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned.

"We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?"

-Kari Lake

We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls.

**It was worse than we could have ever imagined.**

Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it's only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself.

We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game -- and we need to be ready for the long haul.

**[_Is there ANYTHING you can rush to support Kari Lake?_ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec9e1a3bb6ae400ea96ccfb42cdcf66b&_e=IPiro7d67FO6bjJSNTQwLG0Z8kjqQgIZfrGF_KXi9vKmtC666Ktuxb1p53SDvxuNOjuaoZ6xos9UHFeorG1GFUXThesiFRJzf85UMhUIyII310iVcVLHol4l9Iv4O1ide6mhHe6pgEFVxNVwDczXJvPQZSJB1qNYmWiLV23uLRouWooFwbBlZy8EoZLLBGgcQJsplt4tN9WQZh-V3kumHsILkS5nqL2WXocH4sgmGW4Y0FvXhiwcnZAJcOHqm6NWsYMlvhLA5zBspCtpXkXyu6eARHQH3fWNuwLlv4kyfKdNN2pzWIwN2ZexFxBlHCGptSle48g4-maMJr9ODoCq9EZRvb-RtY-CGjtUgXIKmn4Lg2KxQhyfOqmpSB31JKVK__X3EIIGIgcrr8db1tVDNsss7V2wDG6Fa6OpL2TVXrJCYVB2pUyWGNxuJDFjapKMUgNJlSCKGUrGz33g-qMR55b5PdEkCPylepWhYfmd-96Zv7Xa2QY66TuJtGqn1gVr)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to Congress: Provide election funding before the end of the year
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc5cfba1-4df8-4bbc-aaca-08004b786856/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, An essential part of safeguarding our democracy is ensuring that our elections run smoothly. That requires proper [funding](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09f6726d-8836-48fa-ab89-1ea6f360e9f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If jurisdictions fail to keep up with the ongoing costs of elections, it can result in using outdated equipment, inadequate training, and accessibility issues, threatening the safety and security of our election system. [**Sign the petition to Congress: Provide election funding before January.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td083e018-7988-48a9-84ac-d4579a383dc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Federal funding for elections over the past two decades has been woefully insufficient. The last significant federal elections law, the Help America Vote Act, was passed in 2002 after the turbulent 2000 election. Although there have been occasional grants since then, they don’t come near the increasing costs required to replace outdated election infrastructure and ensure election departments are fully staffed and resourced. One conservative estimate puts the costs of federal elections at $2 billion, which could increase to $5 billion in the coming years.
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1150fa6b-9235-41fc-a5f9-837ac0052b3e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | If we hope to keep the integrity of elections intact, we need better and more reliable funding. With the 2024 election coming at us fast, and Republican election deniers taking over control of the House in January, now is the time to ensure our elections are properly funded. [**Democrats must provide election funding now before the House changes hands in January. Sign the petition to Congress: Provide election funding before January.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te34711d9-c4ee-4d9e-b50e-341a086ca3b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

---
| | | Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda, and important progressive causes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba96252b-b5d2-4812-9cfb-d77a56c095d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5daca975-21ca-49e7-a382-245e4eac3042/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=67117a28514e42c288d3be49f7bd97b8&_e=ucG0pbLTTjP4zoJ8IZwZLpdA3Z_Vre6vZ65EPXIXO2XV45D8H8LR2p-uIZEdAH3BEzeGC0--8EkWiN0_dsc3YOcLj1r3R2z_7b01PCQClAdzQIT9xaU0kjk-njNf_cRtyCTGyjZun5oQXB2KN6peDUuM8gxAguguMchfHJ66lXMmxQugaAerJvC3iT4GHZr9IXX_401n02QjhXcjZnrwRGxQvqkH9zhN6LmOrnP_vb5XDi0qP4a1loLCarGVqxrydYQgxnBFYSPOcPn6AvADcEz8kSvWNujWvyEt6JCyAQPHhwrrhr_dR00VUbQ9GhA1dIp8EVZ0W-WUnuSJ0v3_YHEtWvDW_OyuKQH1NviB_Xo%3D)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=67117a28514e42c288d3be49f7bd97b8&_e=ucG0pbLTTjP4zoJ8IZwZLpdA3Z_Vre6vZ65EPXIXO2XV45D8H8LR2p-uIZEdAH3BEzeGC0--8EkWiN0_dsc3YOcLj1r3R2z_7b01PCQClAdzQIT9xaU0kjk-njNf_cRtyCTGyjZun5oQXB2KN6peDUuM8gxAguguMchfHJ66lXMmxQugaAerJvC3iT4GHZr9IXX_401n02QjhXcjZnrwRJEFftjP6_CvQIQ4Q-mT3wwg3e5q1gDnQ3vkLXfNkgVH3AYaQoAzpHuY4HRESawhMIUGu5Qm8okhFfOf6hnVsxYUQDa_TnTg1Le7POjgdAODeeokkqc3_64Vt6ASbnIK7ciaXdorD3uuIhEQ_yPd-i8%3D)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=67117a28514e42c288d3be49f7bd97b8&_e=ucG0pbLTTjP4zoJ8IZwZLpdA3Z_Vre6vZ65EPXIXO2XV45D8H8LR2p-uIZEdAH3BEzeGC0--8EkWiN0_dsc3YOcLj1r3R2z_7b01PCQClAdzQIT9xaU0kjk-njNf_cRtyCTGyjZun5oQXB2KN6peDUuM8gxAguguMchfHJ66lXMmxQugaAerJvC3iT4GHZr9IXX_401n02QjhXcjZnrwRIEq8v3j3brzNXp52dhXaqnxYlOxtyBv1fYJRjHtYwU0N-t5GRG3lPij04kJG98WHFzkwvkjd_NmPr44t6ecEEc0GpfNj2X6cLP8X4Mzq6unY6blYM6WzEl7IbkNfOsDUvDT6cynYqZSf6ixZmFWENg%3D)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=67117a28514e42c288d3be49f7bd97b8&_e=ucG0pbLTTjP4zoJ8IZwZLpdA3Z_Vre6vZ65EPXIXO2XV45D8H8LR2p-uIZEdAH3BEzeGC0--8EkWiN0_dsc3YOcLj1r3R2z_7b01PCQClAdzQIT9xaU0kjk-njNf_cRtyCTGyjZun5oQXB2KN6peDUuM8gxAguguMchfHJ66lXMmxQugaAerJvC3iT4GHZr9IXX_401n02QjhXcjZnrwRLQ4_S0Bs2L1OQr8sljfmuqMT9qky6W7vIsUMMyIowD5cYri4jTL6MnHrBoGsUWkuyivkAiH4Dt6qGeKDudsGw0Jgs80C4Zl8w4rvWMGwcIUTZS_fwcAUOVNqEq0F1Lta41X-Jq4AhVnEn22KrCv14o%3D)

Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

There is always someone who is harder to shop for, so recommendations like hers are really appreciated, especially for people who care about what is going on in the world today. This documentary is one of the most important films of the year, so her suggestion is a good one. But what do you get the person in your life who wants to stay up-to-date on the news, enjoys movies, and loves America? ---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
A Virtual Cinema ticket to _Innovation Race_ is the perfect stocking stuffer, ‘thank you’ card embellishment, or ‘I’m thinking of you’ gift for anyone on your list, so don’t delay. Check those remaining people off your list today! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
|

**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.

body:
Hi Peter. It's Steve Scalise again.
I emailed you a couple times asking for your feedback because I know you're someone I can trust. You might not have seen my messages because I didn't see your response come through yet.
_That's okay because it's not too late!_
[**I just need to hear back from you by 11:59 PM or I'll be forced to close down the survey without your response included. This survey will guide our _entire agenda_ in the first weeks of the new Congress, so this is not something to take lightly. Can you please complete my Majority Leader Survey by the end of the day?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087631:6FLXlGGNw:m:1:3334294963:DD014B3C1A925F9696823FDCA883B652:r)
I'm only asking a few short (but important) questions. This survey won't take long -- I promise.
Your help is greatly appreciated!
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_
* * *
**Hi patriot -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[**Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087631:6FLXlGGNw:m:1:3334294963:DD014B3C1A925F9696823FDCA883B652:r)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**

**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087631:6FLXlGGNw:m:1:3334294963:DD014B3C1A925F9696823FDCA883B652:r)**
Time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[**Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I 've ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087631:6FLXlGGNw:m:1:3334294963:DD014B3C1A925F9696823FDCA883B652:r)

name: Your America
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7655%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=u1l5Su2EG4O88xz7PFSgIw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97221%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zlxq8ZeCrRJ6UAoVtpYKDg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97221%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zlxq8ZeCrRJ6UAoVtpYKDg&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty -- the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97222%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XyfIZsJogXZqtLkVzGDf2A&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efac8ab22de40aa83fc0842389eb09f&_e=v2Hzv2H9F0Bfym3gNtVH7jw6KvG64OCeURuRVouMtEQ_VEFz6Mf1WJkENvUsk1MNwYVQJ71xpP4F_fucmXKnNGMl9sJklnArnV9IEgUQXpChkLSUPjslt0acGhswLSHZ71hKTgEtT0ItttT3XVAuuUC6kxWJEjg2Sv9WVS7IMSIfw9JdduYCIp388z8IOcqlAsH76cgEb4wP6coiveBfLq108wkMw-08mt0zzGoiT16-XDFFuecr8nK0Gk27YsKrkGvlBdBxuHiZrKWHjgR6nH15ALLaPDI6CKp5Ir7I2ZsNr2iP1Bhdf7alT6f4BySlvTO4Xh0fIU4OqwdJ2wMGAPgH4NmZjj3vlwgcYhPBcys9eyClL6zaAmGtyMyen7d2)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efac8ab22de40aa83fc0842389eb09f&_e=v2Hzv2H9F0Bfym3gNtVH7jw6KvG64OCeURuRVouMtEQ_VEFz6Mf1WJkENvUsk1MNwYVQJ71xpP4F_fucmXKnNGMl9sJklnArnV9IEgUQXpChkLSUPjslt0acGhswLSHZ71hKTgEtT0ItttT3XVAuuUC6kxWJEjg2Sv9WVS7IMSIfw9JdduYCIp388z8IOcqlAsH76cgEb4wP6coiveBfLmpK77C2fIJSpYEPgg71HakbmiO68GYj1iR_4WmWNLAOpVrGmOHKrZYLpwoT15AfRKkPiSWZl6gzx8duqr8soMllFIidikplvG1a8eqobQMcMAnqCKhgXrXzOIc05GltPXEFOtDoap-ul_ciqvpXoQmcAMkU81yYPxbV84AFcvcn)**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efac8ab22de40aa83fc0842389eb09f&_e=v2Hzv2H9F0Bfym3gNtVH7jw6KvG64OCeURuRVouMtEQ_VEFz6Mf1WJkENvUsk1MNwYVQJ71xpP4F_fucmXKnNGMl9sJklnArnV9IEgUQXpChkLSUPjslt0acGhswLSHZ71hKTgEtT0ItttT3XVAuuUC6kxWJEjg2Sv9WVS7IMSIfw9JdduYCIp388z8IOcqlAsH76cgEb4wP6coiveBfLleJtYRf9bhQPCRDECk3-aIIp2UkhObnDH1W5_qmFAkEuWMHiqqrNZaMzCW3IsJZ1c1eQu-yMSwoe7FY5k3yejYKsnHODnxB_AoOlmMI025RwHo_NehPb1Rw83EGWfiThfo39IUr3XqCiQ7lwmKH5sNdeecTUqVv219WfJPRPFTJ)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efac8ab22de40aa83fc0842389eb09f&_e=v2Hzv2H9F0Bfym3gNtVH7jw6KvG64OCeURuRVouMtEQ_VEFz6Mf1WJkENvUsk1MNwYVQJ71xpP4F_fucmXKnNGMl9sJklnArnV9IEgUQXpChkLSUPjslt0acGhswLSHZ71hKTgEtT0ItttT3XVAuuUC6kxWJEjg2Sv9WVS7IMSIfw9JdduYCIp388z8IOcqlAsH76cgEb4wP6coiveBfLjN5qgQ9xECZLPVt3-3rXUl0b2JfGJ11-GYMBpqi26M7t5BucQZf-HjImixPcOfAQtnQrRZ6TtH51F0M3esR5zKNTJUAVRfbjmQQKzjorxv_ILh5TLRprykPzKW328b4fDslQ__SHQEq2cRKaEHnenCV-kja0qXZuJtcfsb_gw8c)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1efac8ab22de40aa83fc0842389eb09f&_e=v2Hzv2H9F0Bfym3gNtVH7jw6KvG64OCeURuRVouMtEQ_VEFz6Mf1WJkENvUsk1MNwYVQJ71xpP4F_fucmXKnNGMl9sJklnArnV9IEgUQXpChkLSUPjslt0acGhswLSHZ71hKTgEtT0ItttT3XVAuuUC6kxWJEjg2Sv9WVS7IMSIfw9JdduYCIp388z8IOcqlAsH76cgEb4wP6coiveBfLiRLquttKB7qWYYRUa0iTGTlmqoCEEnDV0wEB8UZrkLC7g42XSXTFob5TNblzpTQ9GEM2cMEuSxsDby2B6P1JGmAgCTqZO0R-oSXrO9OSdL6ScRJm1EVr6J7m5JJM1jXmjUhHjYvU1ZfyUCDCHr-D6HVt9lSCelgfQx3FZ0l8VDw)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zelenko=20Freedom?=
subject: Our Freedom Depends on You
body:
| | | Peter, our country has been taken over by forces that absolutely despise us and we all know that. The sad part is that very few are actually fighting back.**Medical tyranny** will go down in history as the issue of our lifetime... and if we don’t fight back against it, we will see how it affects the generations ahead.When COVID hit, we saw a new world order that had been years in the making begin to take shape. Digital ID cards, vaccine passports, tracking at unprecedented levels - it all came together to RUIN our lives!
---
| [FIGHT BACK AGAINST MEDICAL TYRANNY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0315f63c3f&e=fdefed58de)
---
Dr. Zev Zelenko was one of the lone voices who stepped up right from day one of this medically induced tyranny and called it out. His "Zelenko Protocol" saved millions and millions of Americans. He was one of the leaders of the medical freedom movement, showing us how truly important our bodily autonomy was.
With Zev’s passing, the Zelenko Freedom Foundation has been busy establishing the fundamentals per the IRS code, so that we may accept donations from people who want to support the vision and mission of Dr. Zelenko’s legacy. His legacy and the work he was doing to end medical tyranny **MUST** carry on - and that is our job.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dd22ece8ad&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP US TAKE BACK AMERICA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=22bd81cdd0&e=fdefed58de)
---
We are excited to report that the important work of the Zelenko Freedom Foundation continues! The foundation is the world’s bridge to the future. Dr. Zelenko had a clear vision for a more God centric world, true freedom for humanity, and through the foundation we will deliver and honor the legacy of our hero, Dr. Zev Zelenko.The Z Freedom Foundation has THREE key goals:

1. **INCUBATE:** Find the next generation of biomedical technology that Big Pharma ignores in their quest for profit over your health.
2. **EDUCATE:** Educate the public about how to protect their health and fight for their rights as patients and consumers.
3. **SHARE:** Share valuable information with the world that is often being suppressed by Silicon Valley oligarchs, corrupt corporate interests and incompetent government officials.

Nearly every major foundation worked **AGAINST** our medical autonomy and came down on the side of tyrants during the last two years - now is our time to STOP that and build something **FOR US and BY US**.**The purpose of the Zelenko Freedom Foundation is to find the next brave generation of medical professionals committed to keeping their patients safe without doing the bidding of big pharma.**
| [HELP US SAVE THE NATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a7f18ebef7&e=fdefed58de)
---
Your support of our mission is what will make us successful. Both of us have decided to devote our lives to carrying on Zev's mission. We must NEVER allow our medical autonomy to be stripped from us again. We must never become a nation of medical tyranny... AND WE ARE ALREADY WELL ON OUR WAY!Together, we can stand up against the powers trying to destroy us and ensure that big pharma's power over us comes to an end. **It is possible, but it is a movement that must come from the people. We can't wait on others, we must do it ourselves.****Your donations will jumpstart our work and help us to truly affect change in the medical freedom space. We can’t do this without you — please click below and donate today!**
| [SUPPORT THE Z FREEDOM FOUNDATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ed9e722ecc&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Kevin Jenkins & Ann Vandersteel, Co-Chairs
Zelenko Freedom Foundation
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | _Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved._

Our mailing address is:
American Conservatives United1900 Market StPhiladelphia, PA 19103

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=48df646558) or [unsubscribe](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=48df646558)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48fc2483c6744ec2bca75d76118617b3&_e=O_vi4XIdOlcnLujEkKcaZrQRLa2p09x4sDk7-SSBIoSfqGfQj3dE59pEYGFalnfxO35KL_BB8hV3xWoeVm7PS_9A2Zm7aXAh94DVLg_yrIv53yDxQ2hzqqtXDp_rj0pIH3v7ejovklqqSz6rLp8pIG0JipLlXxysXkQFzm-2QnT7fsIsH54TsiXGgPpt-ddyDwTsoQXMKqvKgZk_aS_e4WC3_rgsh_2U5eRQAL_6dxcsT6GYWpVcx4UjqPlCik62tSzWZUV7W0lbZMDOXZTvYcztxY4KXJdzeI2G92SJvZPYHvd2SkwWWk0mrPb9PrqYYoiTwCJBYSsk1ZrFaAyyMJpJIybd-JSiFTov-Us7Z9432zCnT2dY-H_NNYZKJu3flSvh2wjGiI9jfdwcR6ow4w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48fc2483c6744ec2bca75d76118617b3&_e=O_vi4XIdOlcnLujEkKcaZrQRLa2p09x4sDk7-SSBIoSfqGfQj3dE59pEYGFalnfxO35KL_BB8hV3xWoeVm7PS_9A2Zm7aXAh94DVLg_yrIv53yDxQ2hzqqtXDp_rj0pIH3v7ejovklqqSz6rLp8pIG0JipLlXxysXkQFzm-2QnT7fsIsH54TsiXGgPpt-ddyDwTsoQXMKqvKgZk_aS_e4WC3_rgsh_2U5eRQAL_6dxcklyOktUXmVzd6iGx6oogkY1vQY5g78io4GXqwjp9qsmc39e_3n_UopZjjE6lIonu8GdpdZojJRPJXJyxIZ9aYLtiPwRNIbk6-wbvrbp5r-ZkfSp2l28e1mg4NW_TUWfi9jJl7na7EFv8-34VFNq8Srg-jV2cRr1A1N2TEbIJ5RA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48fc2483c6744ec2bca75d76118617b3&_e=O_vi4XIdOlcnLujEkKcaZrQRLa2p09x4sDk7-SSBIoSfqGfQj3dE59pEYGFalnfxO35KL_BB8hV3xWoeVm7PS_9A2Zm7aXAh94DVLg_yrIv53yDxQ2hzqqtXDp_rj0pIH3v7ejovklqqSz6rLp8pIG0JipLlXxysXkQFzm-2QnT7fsIsH54TsiXGgPpt-ddyDwTsoQXMKqvKgZk_aS_e4WC3_rgsh_2U5eRQAL_6dxfSMJz_0Nph42LeY95ZCTdNB--y1Of4FEn9Zfb2Qv6zpM76hPqYEHsU5NGRObY-TQSo5JaPGY2eGBswAwww4I3nHW8sdiHonLA0EkurfqoaB-uHMcX24mnZKN0I64OkV6sV33oGEUKxRcwMwGkT_soBJgiJyYGCpFgEKC2NXsuevA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0206%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=09nsLd%2fs86AEVzRFHqso8A&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43039%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RAnubFIABN6yeUN3B46Ebg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43030%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kBLh9HchtdB2Wos9NG%2f9cw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43030%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kBLh9HchtdB2Wos9NG%2f9cw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0206%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=09nsLd%2fs86AEVzRFHqso8A&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0206%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=09nsLd%2fs86AEVzRFHqso8A&sysid=1)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f68bac4ac2d149c98d0bf76d13a9c5ae&_e=fgeSQDB2oDtTPwm8JJiiTF7VFvAqCTN_bxYsOfOKrLk7hA0WewaoWrtUw7HEng2jyN-SSMLZKbOwhOjtnReo8IE5y-37HG0eIUFOOP5cBRI69eQvr9Eh8JmbEgkX4QA9Crh_PolWEq1eQ8VafZQ9P3Gr6CbvyWClsKIVSoxKR9BdCbZgPgbU83MW5gh_6oKx0FeRAGGh9YVFYYypid3b0pCjy8ylhuBIUdTTlvGr17CNDayEYJ5smrHEyjJ2WoslgmAK3dIUKOnnXvlKvVOjzlJ6CQlCdkPySl4mcpRlNut5fmRKsViTAypQTRzbXsdShJpSrMvJVvfLuN-2Gl3F-yPSbP7LiFESQwEG1FJiFT35enGUMjSNQKWoduNscAwGaomT4V5tJOO-FP45TXvlvg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f68bac4ac2d149c98d0bf76d13a9c5ae&_e=fgeSQDB2oDtTPwm8JJiiTF7VFvAqCTN_bxYsOfOKrLk7hA0WewaoWrtUw7HEng2jyN-SSMLZKbOwhOjtnReo8IE5y-37HG0eIUFOOP5cBRI69eQvr9Eh8JmbEgkX4QA9Crh_PolWEq1eQ8VafZQ9P3Gr6CbvyWClsKIVSoxKR9BdCbZgPgbU83MW5gh_6oKx0FeRAGGh9YVFYYypid3b0pCjy8ylhuBIUdTTlvGr17CNDayEYJ5smrHEyjJ2Wosl48xRCE4vhAwwMYDYvkqTaNn0YVW8iPF481HES7SxH1nHmzLQZtXe8OgqAlEXWFl6TnfAJMaztm9-nV03tW4J6q38N7M2BHkrCrGfPlwreerCeldUDMr1toLhwzZeUyokCMUd2SN5l9P6E49lD2mLUg%3D%3D)

We need to flip SD-07 to protect Abortion rights in VA

Derek, _Abortion isn’t technically on the ballot in SD-07 this January, but it might as well be._ Jen Kiggans’ seat in the Virginia Senate is an open seat and a special election will be held on January 10th to replace her. Right now, Democrats hold a slim majority in the State Senate, _**but we’re only one seat away from the GOP passing a statewide abortion ban.**_ Flipping this seat would add another layer of protection for abortion rights in Virginia. That’s why Democrats in Virginia’s 7th Senate district have nominated Aaron Rouse, a Virginia Beach City Council member who is proudly pro-choice and has been endorsed by multiple pro-choice leaders and organizations. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Have you been to Dodge City?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
We'll show you around. | | | Hi Peter – If you haven't been to Dodge City, Kansas, we wanted to give you a virtual tour as part of our campaign to show voters what rural towns are really like. **Dodge City is self-described "cowboy country," and the town was once a haven for cowboys and the frontier spirit. Now, the town preserves its Old West charm – and its Republican control.** With local farms, a historic Boot Hill Museum, general store, gunfight reenactments, can-can dance lessons, a variety show, and saloon reenactments, this small town brings a big Western spirit. But Dodge City also sits in the heart of SW Kansas, which has voted red in past elections. We also know that if people in Dodge City, and around the region, showed up to vote, the area would be blue. **In Dodge City, the population is about 64% Latino, and in 2018, it only had one polling location,** serving 28,000 voters. Now, there are two voting locations, and yet Black and Brown voters in the town are still disenfranchised by the locations, harsh polling restrictions, and limited early voting timeframe. We need Democratic voters to show up, and also to be able to equitably have access to voting. Dodge City would be a Democratic haven, but we need more resources to be able to make this goal a reality. ****[**Will you help us make places like Dodge City, Kansas, blue and support Democratic voters in rural areas, Peter?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcfASYubPzdE-iWOSWRp0o7sqmYWU6pyfXIVlphXi07qgSzd4ApBoJUCUku2BjKWAGln6Iffxw-PY9kurbnODpsEAMVhbLUazHUm2ijZpv0kHuPprkmsqy5IOOd3Qtp66-sVp4SDQcTzplrIET7W4Zsi-5R8Ql02FDQuVRRZ0DU2KYyMhmY1yK8m2CyzAoJhh9apGQfPIqihVzyXeEHyrNjXa6cn6SCpdf4iTj59XhYaYJs2oePV-AaIIDcllY_CeIEhBA26dpyxJGtwJMwgHnehF79Jbdc3ZHOCzeJNMax3q_qeHKZXocOMwHfDY58e9R/3s3/b7SO1eV9Qkm-6uoOCQ8VpQ/h0/1ZkZRHGOETNSpL6R7zJ_7VWG-N8wcMaugl5eveMPvr0)**** **[Chip in here****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcfASYubPzdE-iWOSWRp0o7sqmYWU6pyfXIVlphXi07qjiFXTUMGhU9LHK24zL1aJKQusRLRtiFebu15nxRFOIKoAfUla17tjVIGJD212va41f0mSd6xdp6XseETPsWq-ZSI_gAxt33DfKuJyjuheUwSRN1yoCXbpqboQV4YW0chjc_dhI4lwirXq8VRSeUV047hGy8PiVWCtcYsQRBvyhJG-czIFm1nJrCqaRctFdpsUx3Qu6dq3oPLgjJhgmD2zt1AmnRoH3IznjoYiSsTjbomAPU_NFCvZAt3i00-yKcWtI5iu7g_k5ifmxutAwjDkF/3s3/b7SO1eV9Qkm-6uoOCQ8VpQ/h1/X_vydX9IKQ0KxetgN3943zWkmq43CuUZq0jvkNZJXV8)** Thank you for all of your support. – United Rural Democrats

subject: He just secured the nomination... YES!
body:
| | | Peter,My friend Leon Benjamin has just secured the nomination to run as the GOP candidate in the special election for Virginia’s 4th District. This is a critical race... as it is the one that will secure an even larger majority in the House of Representatives.This election wasn’t even expected. Rep. Don McEachin died unexpectedly right after his re-election and left this seat WIDE open for the taking. It was tough to beat McEachin, as he had been there forever... but now, with this being an open seat Pastor Leon Benjamin - a Navy combat veteran - can absolutely swing it for the GOP.
---
| [HELP LEON WIN THIS SEAT FOR THE GOP!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ca189c196a&e=fdefed58de)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8124d138758d4247b1af6a74489fa583&_e=DPZEc-usOC-yoh4OZyjLhoXZYTJ9GTr5eS4tSlJCSW8xHAGBftCwLPOm16n3DCmGKMSL5dIj4j5O-zSvE09qg-pjf2mk5sbiFsg9XsjNFbAu61reTsVMm4v-kg0Knu_1McClBREBeVZ5eK_c9AZgG0gphYuN_379VgWV-wnAfOLSfNsb7NnZpm6ukMHQgGIg27H9vWeoASvFpfg_qHk8HFrb5T7lU0RUy4muUxrJeV8zXbDDjtFLUOhzYHK0Rh6hz1EJTIt20JDv5mGe7xumpMWzmBb4R00WXuMUBcSOVt0h5GFAhczpQQPgnUT7aoM40OtSBinyhZGAzpEqrs35-_29AKq6Zi4edCmrmZk3yhU%3D) Dear Friend of the Constitution,
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8124d138758d4247b1af6a74489fa583&_e=DPZEc-usOC-yoh4OZyjLhoXZYTJ9GTr5eS4tSlJCSW8xHAGBftCwLPOm16n3DCmGKMSL5dIj4j5O-zSvE09qg-pjf2mk5sbiFsg9XsjNFbAu61reTsVMm4v-kg0Knu_1McClBREBeVZ5eK_c9AZgG0gphYuN_379VgWV-wnAfOLSfNsb7NnZpm6ukMHQgGIg27H9vWeoASvFpfg_qHk8HJUm9DEpwOIE-rsz50hkUhhtyf_CPomgfdIsg_9YVC2P27SkTkTspzpIbs55t-qhKIJFgEiouAMeCXkTQTCBylzqHXwKeCii__KHbkf5Mzm7KTQvQ2KcX9fPcx78rLBIPN3lbC6Bzh5-bjj4TSpCiVI%3D "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8124d138758d4247b1af6a74489fa583&_e=DPZEc-usOC-yoh4OZyjLhoXZYTJ9GTr5eS4tSlJCSW8xHAGBftCwLPOm16n3DCmGKMSL5dIj4j5O-zSvE09qg-pjf2mk5sbiFsg9XsjNFbAu61reTsVMm4v-kg0Knu_1McClBREBeVZ5eK_c9AZgG0gphYuN_379VgWV-wnAfOLSfNsb7NnZpm6ukMHQgGIg27H9vWeoASvFpfg_qHk8HIdfsYyDq6bLyVLZ5eHOhV61MjXPqYIu0qDDWujimAwvIFXbQRGsChBoArpBJY4V1PhsV1SDk97qhMztH5fj1iCfp7ql4Nv1G7KyTKnc8vQlsSHg36euL0HQoVnv8Gx8WU-Nd8TGRXXBaNFtT_Yf0I8%3D)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8124d138758d4247b1af6a74489fa583&_e=DPZEc-usOC-yoh4OZyjLhoXZYTJ9GTr5eS4tSlJCSW8xHAGBftCwLPOm16n3DCmGKMSL5dIj4j5O-zSvE09qg-pjf2mk5sbiFsg9XsjNFbAu61reTsVMm4v-kg0Knu_1McClBREBeVZ5eK_c9AZgG0gphYuN_379VgWV-wnAfOLSfNsb7NnZpm6ukMHQgGIg27H9vWeoASvFpfg_qHk8HJTQem9nYfOWoAwBVCzN_C1-KBzVoL1yxJJnrN4IgP5d3cEyZPyTCGNpju6Rg1NtwHUEPdkkKQIpxo03gdKnrcXSUT-QWbkK5u0cZyjKX1bpLBTKqk8jT-TwiK9XFNpxxkzY6ftX00SyGmaI7kz53fg%3D)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Peter,

We’ve joined forces with the Democratic Party of Wisconsin to get the word out about the single most impactful election scheduled to happen in 2023. Let us explain.

In April, Democrats will have the opportunity to flip the Supreme Court of Wisconsin to a Democratic majority, which would be _**huge.**_ Here’s why:
* Democrats could undo Wisconsin’s awful gerrymander that has been used as a template for Republicans around the country. Republicans control two-thirds of the state legislative seats despite winning just over half the vote.
* Democrats could overturn Wisconsin’s brutal 1849 abortion law, which bans abortion with no exceptions.
* A Democratic court will stop Trump from undermining the 2024 election by refusing to bend the law to the GOP’s will.

This election is about so much more than just Wisconsin, it’s about stopping the GOP’s anti-democracy movement in its tracks.
