name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lat6qj19cs45uacsr053tnusu13qspj3m37lp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl5g7jhs5ers1fk98e1al1bu131f2gtrejci52m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh4ivr0tc0ig2tfsiufvngrjvs4qjq9qvu6mi500_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zok0c8cjuae2bim295qbn18ie5i6i5jfbs510nf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthr7cmquc18hpqhk2g3ubtv3hf4cqmvk9sv06s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhahv8c38jg08mg1o4ori5vgdj6c0fl70dt02ec0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvd5j323g77vh4jts1v6d86ptlc57tarqnrpbiro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3jm92r9gq07jlcg444dr3ikhs6gdg0bbnbcolo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziepidcalfcqs9f4gholuhvpnosdidip88h3h6ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ff0tnvdgpgu6q0qm6kq0b2234ju4s6smqhno0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjolceb0p0tgc9n373qrh8177qtlilackmo2dvdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7r13aprl0fogbl141f2n57c9aggpovi1a5c013g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z955ug13vtlsrc56tulrfvpj3up1jnpagcc9hja0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb63sdjpg4l85jd808t7b4hfhs23qnq5pf750pso_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2nfv130bvo16n4m5kc0gkitss1s9024vtc73nm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdtc5jf07k9iteub15dndcf16jaj8foub1anu13o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5nrbbafc01k4fv3bfvnbhk8120neq3qhtg7b1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zalhlml8ulhjvv7p5uh2c2dj96g76eevfe96qig0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqoj548kteqefh1nppn8f96rr5u6gji5u9ghumto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47rrsf8kagtagve2apfd6aer267qmnv9dqpkr8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3332u8pftjgjfagifv23qt9opt6g2lb8t8kn12o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpiecor2c1h2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Derek, can I count on you to make a small monthly donation?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Recurring donations are even more essential when election ads aren't blanketing the airwaves, and regular folks are paying less mind to campaigns.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
Derek,
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a monthly recurring donation to our campaign for 2023. But before I do, let me take a moment to explain why your donation is so important, especially today.
**For the last two years through the 2022 midterms, this team raised about $14 million for House Democrats running in tough toss-up districts across the country. And millions more for Senate candidates, including over $500,000 for Rev. Warnock in _just four weeks._** You helped us win competitive races in states like Michigan, Arizona, Virginia, and Pennsylvania, where abortion rights were front and center.
Thanks to the resources we could count on from monthly recurring donations, I was able to travel to events across the country and help our incumbents and Democratic challengers wherever I could, and it made a big difference.
As House Democrats’ National Battleground Finance Chair the past two years, these dollars helped our team lay the groundwork to win these tough races and stop Kevin McCarthy’s so-called "red wave" in its tracks.
I hope it's clear how important a role monthly recurring donations play in sustaining our efforts — especially right now. These funds are even more essential when election ads aren't blanketing the airwaves, and the necessary, enduring work of organizing for the next election begins.
**[So Derek, can I personally count on you to begin making a monthly recurring donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can spare today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.uHjdYd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly recurring donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1041?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.YxqZMu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1033?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.W9X52D&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1034?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.hyvOKm&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1035?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.ifbLFL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1036?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.mRvueh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=dec2022_abs_em_recurring.uHjdYd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221218_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)
---
If you’re still not convinced, I will leave you with one last thought.
Rev. Warnock’s runoff victory in Georgia capped the **first midterm election since 1934** in which the president’s party did not lose a _single_ Senate seat.
The American people saw what we did with the American Rescue Plan, for children and families, for our climate, for health care, for gun safety, for marriage equality, for jobs, infrastructure, and manufacturing — and they rejected the “crazy” that the GOP so often nominates to represent their party.
We couldn't have done any of this without you, so _thank you._
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1468%2E5257348%2Eo0rc-T)**

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6685971b5b674a0dac66df0dbb1a55cf&_e=xoYhPM0_CSdHkj7W9Qk2DrmQqX32AXC_-l4-2At0xXZCSzUEgLkS_g9DHBhGTx-hZwwZ3nlGWf8QnQJ_mAq1FB0TV5fedAMssy5oHeCPpM52r6EiibK9lihEpiyw9zMfDmjOJZAlRkYWVqRvDIPFUQWHsHH1E1Oxv9-qlXPgsrsI-2FJDGzg1f2_Etirnk4gNBI3PeXS0cQEOcrKTHin7mQho4vIgR-4da4JwrE7UPJPgjUepICtgKVSyclKIb1M7zdacZuoYDrZlXoAN1niSqAvM0bfy67M-pg5h1fuWLuzMOkK7xzbNg48T_SA6IYlfSuWJ70QmAtuZqhdVwLuFRJJ9Tx0PzF8TaYz-UhBx_SmpYvuTz9R1yYHHqT-fmSqD5NUYi-w66q1b8UcMUws9Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6685971b5b674a0dac66df0dbb1a55cf&_e=xoYhPM0_CSdHkj7W9Qk2DrmQqX32AXC_-l4-2At0xXZCSzUEgLkS_g9DHBhGTx-hZwwZ3nlGWf8QnQJ_mAq1FB0TV5fedAMssy5oHeCPpM52r6EiibK9lihEpiyw9zMfDmjOJZAlRkYWVqRvDIPFUQWHsHH1E1Oxv9-qlXPgsrsI-2FJDGzg1f2_Etirnk4gNBI3PeXS0cQEOcrKTHin7mQho4vIgR-4da4JwrE7UPJPgjUepICtgKVSyclKIb1MSF12CRAVptOZUSzbz5A-hLH8pkLTYDlb23ENcga_kc7qV9jwVb_A2-mKbsu7Tcy9DYn0VaKJr1Ayzk8mE5e8hy5FyuCuEJA-p33kuRxqDEcuNJQr0-tZ6SXIjLzUvDMBodyhwiOvrouAwQ3KxufGJg%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The Federalist Papers ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. " The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of " The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of " The Federalist Papers" today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e17581b232b4078b2f3a474f3d136f7&_e=iR6AdgaMnRJG17T_d-5_1RassZT9aUIF6FTJtVk2Gp18Ns5CvjJwYpJEMp1IvUoBrefKck-Xf1W3S6ClIeFsLVn8-7u2rMAwouMaHtNUwu4eP5p1MdsLARxfssjQFAWqt_c-3eT_eRRuRl62KjPV42K9If21wdFRlIaHKnAUNwSUmG3UyStfOthTWx72PDk2wP6sJWU4n4ayJ8D9wrEYd-Dm_TDAcPAOULxMKGQXvMv_tnhyVY7yyS08byoxDgSgpa-E9RvEz5OVeJAVZmiTC3dXVvG3AwEFs3Kys6I2BQ7F8blZJ3cuhghLlqtVG66ufmNEBql0DIGjJsZUxEUnLjDRIAdZyoIOVy39p5rRCpeHqw5nFWZeoYvRyN5Zz9656dZTiSQcRHn6z9SM6UI9Sg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e17581b232b4078b2f3a474f3d136f7&_e=iR6AdgaMnRJG17T_d-5_1RassZT9aUIF6FTJtVk2Gp18Ns5CvjJwYpJEMp1IvUoBrefKck-Xf1W3S6ClIeFsLVn8-7u2rMAwouMaHtNUwu4eP5p1MdsLARxfssjQFAWqt_c-3eT_eRRuRl62KjPV42K9If21wdFRlIaHKnAUNwSUmG3UyStfOthTWx72PDk2wP6sJWU4n4ayJ8D9wrEYd-Dm_TDAcPAOULxMKGQXvMtcMTxOD6fmJTFpXKxl173PU24IVx7YHFKHsdon_kHn9B42FKzl8430RA4wcggmN5u7DPQ1u-bRiFuTFAuEzGNd6pm_DV3CgMr-ImbFQQQN-Ya9srnK4_alwaPSQHorZvGE0nF9mifGJDfoB0MZaASFfBbTfm1RVY2HY43AkKQOlg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e17581b232b4078b2f3a474f3d136f7&_e=iR6AdgaMnRJG17T_d-5_1RassZT9aUIF6FTJtVk2Gp18Ns5CvjJwYpJEMp1IvUoBrefKck-Xf1W3S6ClIeFsLVn8-7u2rMAwouMaHtNUwu4eP5p1MdsLARxfssjQFAWqt_c-3eT_eRRuRl62KjPV42K9If21wdFRlIaHKnAUNwSUmG3UyStfOthTWx72PDk2wP6sJWU4n4ayJ8D9wrEYd-Dm_TDAcPAOULxMKGQXvMseYfz5V4Axrvb8Mesuf8seKDvd5D0bOfW4rhZFflWmyqOBeELXMCVg09cODUFu28SpCX8H7_s2wP4c_9R-oB28aTJ6gRidi1xZJP0rN7_7DduqQE5pcRZXC1tDnxjRLfuyNFLI92umvSC1ycEv3HEw0WUCaBt9w1CBcDnRFvU_gQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bd57c4b6c5455db7413b38b7597f8c&_e=M1yorLRcEo1SY73DXBoro3tQQRwfBWifostlOk7mt80hBwPmxPjguxeI4UHJgpEA7fT4doEzesVgSzT2E5t3_Wgkpvcs4V73hW-4So_DUViYRr_C4VlfhXbTXCx7aq9lNxbxdGi_12LcEGJNkuYO1mrz_QuDqZx83f_CO8e3o2Q6xcMX6UqG9bfOnLvNtNMBLM5mU5eY_s-FbiV4rS0ES4yKgtVPA1r8TjFx1vT44JNukdcMYtnUJFIUVTrQhBu5nbATbYFtmrCMe14eq1MQehPhrZKY3H7dh3jYNTiiIfs%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bd57c4b6c5455db7413b38b7597f8c&_e=M1yorLRcEo1SY73DXBoro3tQQRwfBWifostlOk7mt80hBwPmxPjguxeI4UHJgpEA7fT4doEzesVgSzT2E5t3_Wgkpvcs4V73hW-4So_DUViYRr_C4VlfhXbTXCx7aq9lNxbxdGi_12LcEGJNkuYO1uGYUTOtroV_Bjkejx0MsmqAwXdkifjIOmeORQ-oqzwTNf32W-d77XScvrgiT_Pi56VwAU7ln0TC7OPD3RCo0J4C0OBIWSXYtR0zzWWQA0tLzVvvKIxSLEewHq3EItn0avzfiKjZyUDJfsay2yHzTe0%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bd57c4b6c5455db7413b38b7597f8c&_e=M1yorLRcEo1SY73DXBoro3tQQRwfBWifostlOk7mt80hBwPmxPjguxeI4UHJgpEA7fT4doEzesVgSzT2E5t3_Wgkpvcs4V73hW-4So_DUViYRr_C4VlfhXbTXCx7aq9lNxbxdGi_12LcEGJNkuYO1lGUo3nEVc2LQqs9SYWso7WQDMZ0bO6aQOZlpzwyua0RjdbIOPvTBL0bKExxow6NyvQAW4Q2Vt4SZ3LC_CW715IRVPlnDb0e6s45odqVCEclI39rxRDEY4mzjw6Ytg6QnxP81FijhpXmx5kXHXK3Aso%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38bd57c4b6c5455db7413b38b7597f8c&_e=M1yorLRcEo1SY73DXBoro3tQQRwfBWifostlOk7mt80hBwPmxPjguxeI4UHJgpEA7fT4doEzesVgSzT2E5t3_Wgkpvcs4V73hW-4So_DUViYRr_C4VlfhXbTXCx7aq9l5secodxD3Ku7yZaxfm4r7vS-HDCTxfgiIdhTLMd5PgE8ro3_umoGfpZpYJkhcIs-sfXxnrr1cI5iIlXE5qlcnPIm1EVH8GsyNbU_N-aGfPhG4hUkCPE4r8AVQXKTG2ieo0Gsaa0H0jO9X3eL36LBz1JZiea2quBQNwA4XPgty3o%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" name: Shift WA
subject: Top news: Inslee's budget proposal
body:
Now that the World Cup thing is (finally) over, with Christmas just around the corner, and Hanukkah just starting, we know this is a busy time of year. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282900:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Now that the World Cup thing is (finally) over, with Christmas just around the corner, and Hanukkah just starting, we know this is a busy time of year. But, as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Senator Curtis King (R - Yakima) joined us for this week's Newmaker Interview to discuss the Republican's "Power Washington" package. Backers of the package claim its "all-of-the-above" approach to energy production will meet our state's future energy needs better than the Democrats' reckless and very expensive piecemeal proposals. Senator King also offered his thoughts on Governor Inslee and Democrat legislators demanding the ability remove local control over the placement of large solar and wind farms which consume precious farmland and destroy habitat for threatened species. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282901:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r)**.**

**This week 's top story...**
Governor Jay Inslee released his 2023-2025 budget proposal - and demonstrated again his relentless commitment to rapidly increasing the size and cost of state government. His new budget proposal is a whopping 12% larger than the last record-breaking state budget, and more than double the size of the budget when he came into office in 2013. At $70.4 billion, Inslee's budget proposal of course includes a plan to hire more government employees, which means more money to union bosses (and thus more kickbacks to Democrat political campaigns funded with your tax dollars). [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282902:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r)**.**

**In case you missed it ... **
Democrat lawmakers are proposing new legislation to eliminate police officers from pulling over drivers for certain violations. Liberal Senator Joe Nguyen (D - West Seattle) is actually floating an idea of prohibiting police from pulling over drivers who break the law with expired tabs, broken tail or headlights, and other seemingly minor violations. Evidently, the Senator is unconcerned about putting other drivers (and their passengers) in danger due to drivers operating unsafe cars with broken lights or bald tires. Or just breakin g the law in general. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282903:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r)**.
**
P.S. Though we are taking a break from our Daily Briefing until after the new year, if you have not already signed up for it, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282904:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r).

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282905:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r)! | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61282906:WRi5YbDN6:m:1:2610672541:D7700E0C3EE8EF077D30BDD62B95409F:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14093145&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWRi5YbDN6).

Backers of the package claim its "all-of-the-above" approach to energy production will meet our state's future energy needs better than the Democrats' reckless and very expensive piecemeal proposals. Senator King also offered his thoughts on Governor Inslee and Democrat legislators demanding the ability remove local control over the placement of large solar and wind farms which consume precious farmland and destroy habitat for threatened species. . This week 's top story... Governor Jay Inslee released his 2023-2025 budget proposal - and demonstrated again his relentless commitment to rapidly increasing the size and cost of state government. His new budget proposal is a whopping 12% larger than the last record-breaking state budget, and more than double the size of the budget when he came into office in 2013. At $70.4 billion, Inslee's budget proposal of course includes a plan to hire more government employees, which means more money to union bosses (and thus more kickbacks to Democrat political campaigns funded with your tax dollars). . In case you missed it ... Democrat lawmakers are proposing new legislation to eliminate police officers from pulling over drivers for certain violations. Liberal Senator Joe Nguyen (D - West Seattle) is actually floating an idea of prohibiting police from pulling over drivers who break the law with expired tabs, broken tail or headlights, and other seemingly minor violations. Evidently, the Senator is unconcerned about putting other drivers (and their passengers) in danger due to drivers operating unsafe cars with broken lights or bald tires. Or just breakin g the law in general. . P.S. Though we are taking a break from our Daily Briefing until after the new year, if you have not already signed up for it, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking . AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking ! | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, .

body:

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Derek, add your name to pledge to support Democrats in 2023→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The hard work can’t stop now. We need to continue building a strong party infrastructure to elect more Democrats nationwide in the years to come. | |
---
Derek -- as 2022 comes to a close, we’re reflecting on all of the incredible progress President Biden and Democrats have made this year. We passed key legislation, grew our economy, and elected Democrats nationwide in last month’s midterm elections. None of this would have been possible without the support of this dedicated team. Here’s a quick recap:
* Passed critical legislation such as the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , the CHIPS and Science Act, and the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ ;
* Protected our Senate majority (_including flipping a Senate seat in Pennsylvania_), won key gubernatorial races across the country, and flipped state legislatures nationwide;
* Created millions of jobs, lowered health care, energy, and everyday costs for workers and families, and helped grow the economy while tackling inflation;
* Saw President Biden appoint Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson -- the first Black female justice -- to the United States Supreme Court;
* _And so much more!_

In 2023, there are important races up and down the ballot -- and there are no off-years at the DNC. Governors, state legislators, mayors, and local officials are up for election across the nation, and we need to ensure they can continue delivering for their communities. **We need to know you’re committed to electing Democrats in 2023 and beyond. Will you pledge to support Democrats in the new year? Add your name to say you’re all-in.**

clean_body: The hard work can’t stop now. We need to continue building a strong party infrastructure to elect more Democrats nationwide in the years to come. | | Derek -- as 2022 comes to a close, we’re reflecting on all of the incredible progress President Biden and Democrats have made this year. We passed key legislation, grew our economy, and elected Democrats nationwide in last month’s midterm elections. None of this would have been possible without the support of this dedicated team. Here’s a quick recap: Passed critical legislation such as the Inflation Reduction Act , the Respect for Marriage Act , the CHIPS and Science Act, and the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act ; Protected our Senate majority (including flipping a Senate seat in Pennsylvania), won key gubernatorial races across the country, and flipped state legislatures nationwide; Created millions of jobs, lowered health care, energy, and everyday costs for workers and families, and helped grow the economy while tackling inflation; Saw President Biden appoint Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson -- the first Black female justice -- to the United States Supreme Court; And so much more! In 2023, there are important races up and down the ballot -- and there are no off-years at the DNC. Governors, state legislators, mayors, and local officials are up for election across the nation, and we need to ensure they can continue delivering for their communities. We need to know you’re committed to electing Democrats in 2023 and beyond. Will you pledge to support Democrats in the new year? Add your name to say you’re all-in. The hard work can’t stop now. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: What’s Biden Hiding?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Why is Biden trying so hard to keep this a secret?

[](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/7Nt74b8UyAegpLbNYxnxzA~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgcSHP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMveGcxNzU3eTd6ZWZiYi90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC8wMDk0MmMzZDg3MzlkMDk4ZTQzNWU4ZjI4MDhiNWMxNzk5YThiNWFiVwNzcGNCCmOQhz-fY_zhknZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Headline") Peter: Every time I ask how the money sent to Ukraine is being spent, I get stonewalled by the Democrats and Biden officials. We’ve sent almost $45 billion of our tax dollars to Ukraine, and they want to spend even more by Christmas, but they don’t want you to know how it’s being spent. It makes me wonder why they’re trying so hard to keep it a secret! It’s not like the Biden family has ties to Ukraine and enriched themselves by selling access to Ukrainian interests... oh wait, there’s that pesky laptop owned by Hunter that proved EXACTLY that! Now Biden has the audacity to demand that Congress send another $40 billion to Ukraine without any questions. Does the Big Guy have another deal in place that we don’t know about? **[That’s why I’m using my voice in Congress to lead the charge and insure we account for every cent we’ve spent in Ukraine. Help me show the Biden Administration that you demand accountability of our tax dollars with your support of $25, $50, or $100 today.](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/sam1l6q94owsrTXkRegssg~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgcSHP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMveGcxNzU3eTd6ZWZiYi90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC8zMGY4NjZkMTUyODU3N2RhMWE3ZmZmMzdiZTIzOWNhNjQ0YjRjOGQwVwNzcGNCCmOQhz-fY_zhknZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "That’s why I’m using my voice in Congress to lead the charge and insure we account for every cent we’ve spent in Ukraine. Help me show the Biden Administration that you demand accountability of our tax dollars with your support of $25, $50, or $100 today.")** Americans are hurting and we can't afford to have our money squandered or end up in the bank account of a Biden family member. And we’re only going to find that by auditing the Ukraine funds! After all, that money could have been better spent supporting local police whom Biden defunded so we can end America’s crime wave. We could have even used that money to support teachers to educate children who fell behind due to the COVID lockdowns, or to provide more security at America’s schools, but the Biden family has other plans. [](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/vxx3REvrjVGpvUf2mLFFNA~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgcSHP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMveGcxNzU3eTd6ZWZiYi90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC8zNmI1Mzg5NmI0ZjYwZGU0MzAwM2MxYWY5NDUxYmZiMjIwOWY0NDY3VwNzcGNCCmOQhz-fY_zhknZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Headline")After all, we know that Hunter already has long-standing business relationships in Ukraine where he sat on the board of Burisma while his father was Vice President. And lest we forget how the one Chinese company that bought our strategic oil reserves just happened to be linked to Hunter Biden? As the GOP gets control of the House next month, one of my top priorities continues to be rooting out the corruption and grift that grows like weeds in the DC Swamp and the Biden family has mastered it. I’ve got to have your support to overcome the stonewalling from the White House and Congressional Democrats who don’t want me finding out how the billions we've sent to Ukraine were spent. That means we make sure the money meant for bullets, missiles, helicopters, parts, and bombs aren’t also lining the pockets of Biden family members! **[An audit is only going to happen if conservatives like you stand with me to root out the corruption in Washington. Chip in $50, $100, or $250 today and show Washington that we mean business!](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/YZNlIyyEtVP3T3mAPbPOjw~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgcSHP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMveGcxNzU3eTd6ZWZiYi90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC80MjE0OTM5YTIzZDFlNjYzODIxMGM4MWQzZWNkMjNjYWRlN2JjMGQ5VwNzcGNCCmOQhz-fY_zhknZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "An audit is only going to happen if conservatives like you stand with me to root out the corruption in Washington. Chip in $50, $100, or $250 today and show Washington that we mean business!")** The Big Guy has always made sure that the Biden family profits anytime he’s in office, from the U.S. Senate to the White House, but I refuse to give him a pass this time. That's why the Ukraine Audit is a top priority for me, followed by the investigation into the content on Hunter's Laptop. And yes, number 3, is the impeachment of Big Guy himself! All of that can happen, but only if you help me overcome their stonewalling. The Liberal media and their Deep State allies who profit off secrecy are already targeting me and trying to help Biden prevail. **[It’s vital you help me bulldoze their stonewalling, lift the veil and expose EXACTLY where every dollar is being spent on these Ukraine funds. Show them you stand for integrity and accountability with your donation today!](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/vNP58k_Bq_He57eyyFa8_Q~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgcSHP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMveGcxNzU3eTd6ZWZiYi90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC83NGNjMmNlZGM0MDE2Y2YwNjllODQwNzg5MTE2NGE0MjVlOTI2MTk1VwNzcGNCCmOQhz-fY_zhknZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "It’s vital you help me bulldoze their stonewalling, lift the veil and expose EXACTLY where every dollar is being spent on these Ukraine funds. Show them you stand for integrity and accountability with your donation today!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Anthony Fauci lied to the American people and as a result, thousands of people died.

— Eric Swalwell

body:
we need to know your thoughts on the Jan. 6th Committee before the first hearing begins: | | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. clean_body: we need to know your thoughts on the Jan. 6th Committee before the first hearing begins: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | When: Where: | The January 6th Committee is expected to make an announcement on who they will be criminally referring to the Justice Department. So We must know if you plan on watching the new January 6th Committee Public Hearing on Monday. | | | Thanks for your response, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Now, _we need to rethink our Democratic strategy before the new year._ Unfortunately, all of the data we’ve previously collected is now invalid and we need your help.

We’re surveying Democrats nationwide to establish Democratic priorities for 2023 – and as one of our smartest supporters, your response is due at midnight tonight, Peter.

If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8TSRo7tv2DJqd8l_2EeBEBzuSKkyoEGdTFNYR94VzmzhYmmKDSeIKg56DgzH2qzngtPLp3XrxTrdbjtdN6ZTkRVvzzFYJZytK_0OFILif1qG9AMTGw5NIGTbtOzp5Z4OEXJgWRa3PoEb0Svi1mobJvsGoVqik2vidVC7MtSCYc8eP2DztoMy_4Q3874cn5H50zic7s97aF_2Ma-zOvYWdBE_dmZLMbi6fzCcQLlObdnaCmz8LImlS3kvQEiLXhlEHxIOWfKGBCUCicm5SbmDSGe31zWKDO2cnUVERqUQy421HV0jpDu7j3kY4Ub1Y-jD4Q/3s3/IAJUWcnCSnG6W_ghRD_zYw/h0/pgiRbZHCXbheRnw-hggqJ5RUunVk-aQbJkJUISqXlWU)
| | Dear Peter,

From all of us at The Collective PAC, we’d like to wish those who celebrate a Happy Hanukkah. We hope the coming days of celebration are filled with joy and light.

The story of Hanukkah is one of resilience and hope but also serves as an important reminder to celebrate those close to us.

We are so grateful for your support each and every day. And as we begin this holiday season, we want to thank you again for everything you do to help #BuildBlackPoliticalPower.

Happy Hanukkah!

The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iddR66xZZlwjt56kZsolHr0tbwH0B0u5GkLRextXSQ7iCygOPJ0sFQQ8qiMZ1RhFildarm6ulojMCyBAQSYCuYaqTQ0u9YrTspr-89wo89GJg82X_S8ooYivwKF2hagAFAv-URERk42PdfUslOj4mEWXK0ztt45Z7c2Tsau94Xm4JElxXYEZsZFuQJh59w5kH4Ybm6pWgFrPwSUsAiEUOImJCc3XDLsMjH9r_-s6UfXWXHETW-mb0jKbmGn7bYqcga14iC8cEUu_wF-0vXG9hY1UZdoYsbN8iRGdVuPvzY8Ece9QgPPju4KDNMRIEfaf_wOrNk1a_hZx7pzt-mbxgsM/3s3/IAJUWcnCSnG6W_ghRD_zYw/h1/ZBxjMGR14EoBW5DBna9LWea8UcVj96AVB-T_HxxM5Kc) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
---

name: Jamie Long
subject: Keeping our momentum
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=121822 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=121822]
Friend,
What a year 2022 has been! We can’t thank you enough for your support. Because of you, we were able to hold onto our House DFL majority and win a DFL trifecta, putting us in position to help Minnesotans more than ever. As the incoming Majority Leader for the Minnesota House, I am excited about the work to come. We have such strong momentum, and we can’t let it fade away. Will you make a contribution today and help us keep our momentum through the end of the year?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=121822]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=121822]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=121822]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=121822]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane_other=true&refcode=121822]
The House DFL is excited to get to work in January to address the needs of Minnesotans. We will continue to put workers and families first, from investing in our schools to lowering health care costs. Thank you for all your support this year, and thank you for helping us go into 2023 stronger than ever.
Jamie Long
Majority Leader-elect
Minnesota House DFL
P.S. Don’t forget to use your Political Contribution Refund before the year is out! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=121822]

Saint Paul, MN 55105

**Attorney General Miyares is fighting to ensure that parents have proper consultative resources to help them protect their children from harmful and inappropriate content online.** ___“TikTok’s ineffective software’s age-verification_ _features fail to filter content based on age_ _appropriateness ratings. It deceives parents_ _into allowing their children to be potentially_ _exposed to mature content...which have real_ _consequences on their development and_ _health. Apple and Google have a responsibility_ _to correct the categorical appropriateness_ _standards of TikTok on Google Play and the_ _Apple App Store.”_ **– Attorney General Miyares**
---
[**LEARN MORE HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=f6a520d737a14714956356236eec8993&_e=CWJFhgtAGl2aLgeSQZ2IiXkQKfXNi29Vh-XQoIqjeS5UleLaSIXOfuX51vi4QMwn5V6GMF2C9eZACZ_XMszKKz_pdvLW1ykZh59-qoo0Wg6Q-sfenFQWfO4YoWqu3SgNtEnj1UWarM6KZDJOCA_FkYgJhqZvlxkYJSJyDmQ1rl63WNIbQcyq-AK8BTAIdYCmSHTLhdoRCbQ4V74a6yV2LpZPcOkWmTQkFMluPevI3nVwa_zOQm6NB9Ur4XyzMPJOlH2nuYAr1S5Y2efljD9x8veyvP9FTuZ6DvTs0WMqlE2ChgiUdx949X7OrUGXh0wc8MSo5SxLEohf7h3Sym7UBoiLyLpWGSAfI9kVxGOZMiUhNWgvgcZEt4LKiPqwysw4)

**Thank you, Col. Pike!**

---
AG Miyares extends his gratitude & congratulations to retiring Virginia Capitol Police Chief Col. Anthony Pike. Thank you for your unconditional bravery and courage.

| | _“Thousands of Virginians are struggling with opioid addiction. These opioid settlement funds play an important role in providing resources to fight back against the epidemic, including prevention practices, harm reduction, and treatment services.”_ **– Attorney General Miyares** **Opioid settlement funds go to the Opioid Abatement Authority Fund – an independent entity established by the General Assembly to abate and remediate the epidemic in the Commonwealth.**
---
[**LEARN MORE ABOUT THIS SETTLEMENT HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=f6a520d737a14714956356236eec8993&_e=CWJFhgtAGl2aLgeSQZ2IiXkQKfXNi29Vh-XQoIqjeS5UleLaSIXOfuX51vi4QMwn5V6GMF2C9eZACZ_XMszKK8dX1QKjkIEmOxIaXol8Yud1NNaF0eAjiSYsKNGrSp66slz9k_fdlG3QdeQnBr1V2dzPapRex40tYYHFvlVBzWlQzuGuOnqnpRw1IJoiyWoB86VBTG58TOk00A2zX83PPP6PJhzXwh_8Z7WbNyww55PGzoG6DVI0Vb8JxU6oIAeIuaZIGZ368IJp2DRBKfJafIWKqJtsTfZSgD_qzT1deutOVRcakF4N_qqbF6jVz4LWFuMH2A2d4Q-mkdiguZVDIlpUBRA-VVuFVE4YUWkwUB9cUL4emClDeBaletuIkF8w)

clean_body: | | | | | The special grand jury appointed by Attorney General Miyares issued four indictments against two Loudoun County Public Schools officials throughout the course of its investigation. The Office of Attorney General will be prosecuting these cases. Attorney General Miyares is fighting to ensure that parents have proper consultative resources to help them protect their children from harmful and inappropriate content online. “TikTok’s ineffective software’s age-verification features fail to filter content based on age appropriateness ratings. It deceives parents into allowing their children to be potentially exposed to mature content...which have real consequences on their development and health. Apple and Google have a responsibility to correct the categorical appropriateness standards of TikTok on Google Play and the Apple App Store.” – Attorney General Miyares Thank you, Col. Pike! AG Miyares extends his gratitude & congratulations to retiring Virginia Capitol Police Chief Col. Anthony Pike. Thank you for your unconditional bravery and courage. | | “Thousands of Virginians are struggling with opioid addiction. These opioid settlement funds play an important role in providing resources to fight back against the epidemic, including prevention practices, harm reduction, and treatment services.” – Attorney General Miyares Opioid settlement funds go to the Opioid Abatement Authority Fund – an independent entity established by the General Assembly to abate and remediate the epidemic in the Commonwealth. | | | | Justice has no expiration date. “Every victim deserves to be heard. My office is dedicated to investigating and prosecuting those who prey on children to the fullest extent of the law.” – Attorney General Miyares Virginia AsianChamber of Commerce | | | | | This week, Attorney General Miyares joined the Virginia Asian Chamber of Commerce (VACC) as their keynote speaker. Organizations like the VACC work to develop and support Virginia’s workforce. Thank you for investing in Virginians! | | Last year, Virginians voted for change. As his first year as AG nears, we are very proud of the positive developments made in public safety and accountability standards throughout Virginia. Until next time,Team Miyares | | DONATE TODAY TO STAND WITH JASON IN CONTINUING TO PROTECT VIRGINIAN FAMILIES AND STANDING FOR OUR VALUES. | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f72e292557d645c69f05e8ef39404123&_e=1wuise6bHUhybGGo5HY4L5j63PWnw5ZwMChPcm3-5ckAGQEdlQIFbUgZINt7a4PUmy4rX59x8huo9zbKZltK66vc16DHl49iJDfY1pxFv-n9XS-DdiSIaByDUQltbLrAqIPIO_r62_r6LgwMTQoK2HPkp6gW-PmOMLXtmDKzGJb19WYVQ0wAajusJhdcJ-yLBFyrZ1uFBJsDKbmxHcHISyfi6ipFVGtC-DF2vlyAtDrQincqsLG4MqND_SEC8x0zC5zupCuSwVePqhBu2cafrytiw1OvLfWgo7yrIwPIC491_J-NHbVoOTJlQl4zCnE2wtc0klEyvU8CKFKs9qzLXIclhsk5B3HzEAtReW-RdKV-VhM28lv0HZHO9NwznTJQlC6ubD4Px_9T1fNtQbmEhw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f72e292557d645c69f05e8ef39404123&_e=1wuise6bHUhybGGo5HY4L5j63PWnw5ZwMChPcm3-5ckAGQEdlQIFbUgZINt7a4PUmy4rX59x8huo9zbKZltK66vc16DHl49iJDfY1pxFv-n9XS-DdiSIaByDUQltbLrAqIPIO_r62_r6LgwMTQoK2HPkp6gW-PmOMLXtmDKzGJb19WYVQ0wAajusJhdcJ-yLBFyrZ1uFBJsDKbmxHcHISyfi6ipFVGtC-DF2vlyAtDrQCyYML9WbieISocAQbs-WLhyVKG8D1ohjAUUa91_7w_hH7tQBGGSoVbkqN6UfVrq3GwtJRFepkCSLCJsF4kG3RegrlODNpaEXb0V9weYGZwBDuXSYxKSiXM9pRxNnYE3vmFUwZtmIomShsox-DF7RpncpPcztX9LDc6IKLoRDXg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f72e292557d645c69f05e8ef39404123&_e=1wuise6bHUhybGGo5HY4L5j63PWnw5ZwMChPcm3-5ckAGQEdlQIFbUgZINt7a4PUmy4rX59x8huo9zbKZltK66vc16DHl49iJDfY1pxFv-n9XS-DdiSIaByDUQltbLrAqIPIO_r62_r6LgwMTQoK2HPkp6gW-PmOMLXtmDKzGJb19WYVQ0wAajusJhdcJ-yLBFyrZ1uFBJsDKbmxHcHISyfi6ipFVGtC-DF2vlyAtDoZ-Wj3jnOIpMDhC0rUlzXZZltkSvcGblsDlLUz4AsD7rly4yGXqxNKnM4A_M4Xk_g9ZIObxpGSVA3IpKSgWm1BI7VX5PANpKRSwhY5DgPK_nF_cifC5VIAxX0ny9fCPFa1X_SriF9MUj2_A3VMzLYqfi9DGMs32NKY7DzSNb5C-A%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f72e292557d645c69f05e8ef39404123&_t=2xA580JCL78eiYKP4HY0quY5BrsrYLyYtOcnw0PsBT2sttLsAuZeqZpaGSJlMtSWdk51aqo8lKu91O7xkI-zRsxo-h1PGv6_q65sze2jDJ3yQ6C3D9tl_R7m3xPjJ7dh-323LKn0aRPTIxAN7zjgEtu9u7GNPzzKevRIT93MnQk%3D)
